errors.constraint: Zig WASI Strategies must be self-contained and cannot use host filesystem, network, time, randomness, process, or embed-file capabilities.
errors.message: Zig Strategy source contains forbidden capability: @import("std")
errors.remediation: Remove @import("std") and use only Strategy input data.

warnings.constraint: Zig may run only in non-counted exhibition beta proof paths.
warnings.message: Zig WASM/WASI is a non-counted exhibition beta runtime and not ranked/counted eligible.
